---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement.

## Motivation
Why do you want this feature? What problem does it solve?
- Use case 1
- Use case 2
- Relevant to issue #[number]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of how you would like the feature to work:

### Command Line Interface Example
```bash
datagrep data.csv field value [new-option] [value]
```

### Configuration File Example
```json
{
  "new_option": "value"
}
```

## Alternative Solutions Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
- Performance impact (if any)
- Compatibility considerations
- Dependencies (if needed)
- Phase/Timeline preference (v1.0, v1.1, etc.)

## Related Issues
- Related to #[issue_number]
- Could fix #[issue_number]
